original: I got a ring 看着你眼睛说我愿意
latin: I got a ring, kàn zhe nǐ yǎn jīng shuō wǒ yuàn yì
english: I got a ring, looking into your eyes and saying "I do"

original: 这颗心 交给你 希望你好好珍惜
latin: zhè kē xīn, jiāo gěi nǐ, xī wàng nǐ hǎo hǎo zhēn xī
english: I'm giving this heart to you, I hope you will cherish it well

original: I got a ring 因为幸福喜极而泣
latin: I got a ring, yīn wèi xìng fú xǐ jí ér qì
english: I got a ring, crying tears of joy because of happiness

original: 答应你 从今起
latin: dā yìng nǐ, cóng jīn qǐ
english: I promise you, from this day forward

original: 做你的妻和你永不分离
latin: zuò nǐ de qī hé nǐ yǒng bù fēn lí
english: To be your wife and never be apart from you

original: 已经很难动心在我这样的年纪
latin: yǐ jīng hěn nán dòng xīn zài wǒ zhè yàng de nián jì
english: It's hard to fall in love easily at my age

original: 有时会回避也有时候逢场作戏
latin: yǒu shí huì huí bì yě yǒu shí hòu féng chǎng zuò xì
english: Sometimes I'd avoid it, sometimes I'd just play along

original: 成年人的默契 酒精麻痹过去
latin: chéng nián rén de mò qì, jiǔ jīng má bì guò qù
english: The unspoken rules of adults, numbing the past with alcohol

original: 经历了几段情让一颗心慢慢封闭
latin: jīng lì le jǐ duàn qíng ràng yī kē xīn màn màn fēng bì
english: Experiencing a few relationships slowly closed off my heart

original: 也许这正是天意老天让我遇见了你
latin: yě xǔ zhè zhèng shì tiān yì lǎo tiān ràng wǒ yù jiàn le nǐ
english: Maybe it's destiny that heaven let me meet you

original: 像一只春天的小鹿撞进了我的怀里
latin: xiàng yī zhī chūn tiān de xiǎo lù zhuàng jìn le wǒ de huái lǐ
english: Like a little spring deer rushing into my arms

original: 夏日海风的热情 融化了我这块冰
latin: xià rì hǎi fēng de rè qíng, róng huà le wǒ zhè kuài bīng
english: The passion of the summer sea breeze melted my icy heart

original: 冬季柔软的围巾天冷了会把我抱紧
latin: dōng jì róu ruǎn de wéi jīn tiān lěng le huì bǎ wǒ bào jǐn
english: Like a soft winter scarf holding me tight when it gets cold

original: 幸运却害怕失去 对爱情不再相信
latin: xìng yùn què hài pà shī qù, duì ài qíng bù zài xiāng xìn
english: Feeling lucky but afraid of losing, I had stopped believing in love

original: 你触摸我的犹豫 你抚慰我的忧郁
latin: nǐ chū mō wǒ de yóu yù, nǐ fǔ wèi wǒ de yōu yù
english: You touched my hesitation, you soothed my melancholy

original: 曾经我心如灰烬 却因你泛起涟漪
latin: céng jīng wǒ xīn rú huī jìn, què yīn nǐ fàn qǐ lián yī
english: My heart was once like ashes, but you caused ripples in it

original: 从那一刻你吻我趁我还来不及反应
latin: cóng nà yī kè nǐ wěn wǒ chèn wǒ hái lái bù jí fǎn yìng
english: From the moment you kissed me before I could even react

original: 每当我慢慢的
latin: měi dāng wǒ màn màn de
english: Whenever I slowly

original: 靠近鼻翼或脸颊的回应
latin: kào jìn bí yì huò liǎn jiá de huí yìng
english: Lean in for a response on the nose or cheek

original: 当我越来越接近 你眼神如此的肯定
latin: dāng wǒ yuè lái yuè jiē jìn, nǐ yǎn shén rú cǐ de kěn dìng
english: As I get closer, your eyes are so certain

original: 将你捧在我掌心 这一生为你all in
latin: jiāng nǐ pěng zài wǒ zhǎng xīn, zhè yī shēng wèi nǐ all in
english: Holding you in the palm of my hand, going all in for you this lifetime

original: Baby我愿为你付出一切 包括我的命
latin: Baby wǒ yuàn wèi nǐ fù chū yī qiè, bāo kuò wǒ de mìng
english: Baby, I am willing to give everything for you, even my life

original: I got a ring 看着你眼睛说我愿意
latin: I got a ring, kàn zhe nǐ yǎn jīng shuō wǒ yuàn yì
english: I got a ring, looking into your eyes and saying "I do"

original: 这颗心 交给你 希望你好好珍惜
latin: zhè kē xīn, jiāo gěi nǐ, xī wàng nǐ hǎo hǎo zhēn xī
english: I'm giving this heart to you, I hope you will cherish it well

original: I got a ring 因为幸福喜极而泣
latin: I got a ring, yīn wèi xìng fú xǐ jí ér qì
english: I got a ring, crying tears of joy because of happiness

original: 答应你 从今起
latin: dā yìng nǐ, cóng jīn qǐ
english: I promise you, from this day forward

original: 做你的妻和你永不分离
latin: zuò nǐ de qī hé nǐ yǒng bù fēn lí
english: To be your wife and never be apart from you

original: 习惯亲吻你额头 习惯了牵着手
latin: xí guàn qīn wěn nǐ é tóu, xí guàn le qiān zhe shǒu
english: Used to kissing your forehead, used to holding hands

original: 习惯了互相依靠 月光下慢慢走
latin: xí guàn le hù xiāng yī kào, yuè guāng xià màn màn zǒu
english: Used to relying on each other, walking slowly under the moonlight

original: 有你的日子之后 我不再出去喝酒
latin: yǒu nǐ de rì zi zhī hòu, wǒ bù zài chū qù hē jiǔ
english: Since the days I've had you, I don't go out drinking anymore

original: 我学会珍惜感情 学会感恩这所有
latin: wǒ xué huì zhēn xī gǎn qíng, xué huì gǎn ēn zhè suǒ yǒu
english: I've learned to cherish love and be grateful for everything

original: 春天公园的小路看着樱花散步回家
latin: chūn tiān gōng yuán de xiǎo lù kàn zhe yīng huā sàn bù huí jiā
english: Walking home along the park path in spring, looking at cherry blossoms

original: 夏日清凉的午夜试着帮你吹干头发
latin: xià rì qīng liáng de wǔ yè shì zhe bāng nǐ chuī gān tóu fa
english: Trying to blow-dry your hair on cool summer midnights

original: 冬天你泡着热茶 我陪你窝在沙发
latin: dōng tiān nǐ pào zhe rè chá, wǒ péi nǐ wō zài shā fā
english: You brew hot tea in winter, and I cuddle with you on the sofa

original: 相濡以沫成了彼此生命中的牵挂
latin: xiāng rú yǐ mò chéng le bǐ cǐ shēng mìng zhōng de qiān guà
english: Supporting each other through everything, we became the anchors in each other's lives

original: 何德何能 我能拥有如此温柔的女人
latin: hé dé hé néng, wǒ néng yōng yǒu rú cǐ wēn róu de nǚ rén
english: How did I get so lucky to have such a gentle woman

original: 在最低沉的时候陪伴我让我再启程
latin: zài zuì dī chén de shí hòu péi bàn wǒ ràng wǒ zài qǐ chéng
english: Accompanying me at my lowest points and giving me the strength to start again

original: 用你最好的青春安慰我躁郁的灵魂
latin: yòng nǐ zuì hǎo de qīng chūn ān wèi wǒ zào yù de líng hún
english: Using your best years to comfort my restless soul

original: 一颗心渐渐地安稳
latin: yī kē xīn jiàn jiàn de ān wěn
english: My heart is gradually finding peace

original: 因为你一次次包容
latin: yīn wèi nǐ yī cì cì bāo róng
english: Because of your endless forgiveness

original: Oh my babe 对你说声感谢
latin: Oh my babe duì nǐ shuō shēng gǎn xiè
english: Oh my babe, let me say thank you

original: 有了你 这世界从此不再凛冽
latin: yǒu le nǐ, zhè shì jiè cóng cǐ bù zài lǐn liè
english: With you, this world is no longer freezing cold

original: 答应你 我一定爱得更加热切
latin: dā yìng nǐ, wǒ yī dìng ài de gèng jiā rè qiè
english: I promise you, I will love you even more passionately

original: 爱到底 就算整个宇宙毁灭
latin: ài dào dǐ, jiù suàn zhěng gè yǔ zhòu huǐ miè
english: Loving you to the end, even if the whole universe is destroyed

original: 穿过漫长的岁月
latin: chuān guò màn cháng de suì yuè
english: Through the long years

original: 终于站在你面前
latin: zhōng yú zhàn zài nǐ miàn qián
english: Finally standing right in front of you

original: 无论健康与否 富贵贫贱
latin: wú lùn jiàn kāng yǔ fǒu, fù guì pín jiàn
english: Whether in sickness or in health, for richer or poorer

original: 我会永远在你身边
latin: wǒ huì yǒng yuǎn zài nǐ shēn biān
english: I will forever be by your side

original: 看你为我带上婚戒
latin: kàn nǐ wèi wǒ dài shàng hūn jiè
english: Watching you put the wedding ring on me

original: 听你说出爱的誓言
latin: tīng nǐ shuō chū ài de shì yán
english: Hearing you speak your vows of love

original: 手相牵
latin: shǒu xiāng qiān
english: Our hands held together

original: 我们的爱到永远
latin: wǒ men de ài dào yǒng yuǎn
english: Our love will last forever

original: I got a ring 看着你眼睛说我愿意
latin: I got a ring, kàn zhe nǐ yǎn jīng shuō wǒ yuàn yì
english: I got a ring, looking into your eyes and saying "I do"

original: 这颗心 交给你 希望你好好珍惜
latin: zhè kē xīn, jiāo gěi nǐ, xī wàng nǐ hǎo hǎo zhēn xī
english: I'm giving this heart to you, I hope you will cherish it well

original: I got a ring 因为幸福喜极而泣
latin: I got a ring, yīn wèi xìng fú xǐ jí ér qì
english: I got a ring, crying tears of joy because of happiness

original: 答应你 从今起
latin: dā yìng nǐ, cóng jīn qǐ
english: I promise you, from this day forward

original: 做你的妻和你永不分离
latin: zuò nǐ de qī hé nǐ yǒng bù fēn lí
english: To be your wife and never be apart from you
